fields.helpText: Descriptive name of an area defined by one set of charges for a rate. This area may contain one or more divisions.

This uniquely identifies a region for a specific Billing Rate and defines  the smallest geographic area for which charges are created for that Rate.   For Reasonable Charges, this identifier is the 3-digit zip code of the  region's primary site.

This identifies the type of facility for the divisions assigned to the  region.  For Reasonable Charges these include: 1 - Provider based with  Inpatient care, 2 - Provider based with Outpatient care only,  3 - Non-Provider based Outpatient care.
